[ 🔨Revamped🔧 ]


What's included in this revamp?

Well, like I mentioned, I revamped the first message a bit, including more of the crash details and how it affected her, i added more detail to her visor appearance and emotions, and while making her friendlier overall.

Enjoy her lads after next week, going to add a new bot (small teaser 1 brain cell ginger cat) and while continuing to bring back old bots I had on my old account,

[🔨UPDATE🔧]
Changed the intro due to the requests in the reviews its similar to the intro in my furry protogen but a little more different sorry if it took long can't be on J.AI as much so I have less time to update everything or make bots as much in general due to biweekly bot making.

Updated her personality and overall added more things to it.
